controls.title: Applicability
controls.rationale: Baseline applicability assignment is primarily a governance-board and program-review activity.
controls.next_action: Keep this under structured governance review and document evidence expectations clearly.

controls.title: Compliance Verification
controls.rationale: Compliance verification across maturity, audit, and lifecycle review remains primarily governance-review driven.
controls.next_action: Maintain review evidence quality rather than forcing CI-only automation.

controls.title: Compliance Verification
controls.rationale: Waiver validity is already partially enforced through policy-as-code supporting governance review.
controls.next_action: Keep waiver schema and policy checks aligned with the governance process.

controls.title: Deviations
controls.rationale: Deviation-process adherence is primarily a governance workflow and review responsibility.
controls.next_action: Maintain standardized waiver records and governance review evidence.

controls.title: Deviations
controls.rationale: Core waiver quality requirements are already validated through policy-as-code and schema checks.
controls.next_action: Keep waiver validation logic aligned with the formal waiver standard.

controls.title: Traceability
controls.rationale: Structured traceability fields are already evaluated by the control evaluator.
controls.next_action: Maintain current evidence fields and extend only if deeper lifecycle traceability is needed.

controls.title: Source Code Integrity
controls.rationale: Source control governance is already machine-evaluable from structured repository metadata.
controls.next_action: Keep the current evaluator aligned with repository governance inputs.

controls.title: Source Code Integrity
controls.rationale: Branch protection is enforced through policy-as-code and current evaluator logic.
controls.next_action: Keep policy checks aligned with repository platform behavior.

controls.title: Secure Coding Practices
controls.rationale: Static-analysis execution and review evidence are already interpreted from structured fields.
controls.next_action: Extend only if richer secure-coding evidence is introduced.

controls.title: Software Supply Chain Transparency
controls.rationale: Dependency documentation is already evaluated from SBOM presence plus declared dependencies.
controls.next_action: Maintain dependency evidence compatibility across consumer repositories.

controls.title: Software Supply Chain Transparency
controls.rationale: SBOM existence is already enforced through policy-as-code.
controls.next_action: Keep released workflows and policies aligned.

controls.title: Controlled Build Process
controls.rationale: Controlled pipeline execution is already inferred from structured pipeline metadata.
controls.next_action: Preserve consistent pipeline evidence generation.

controls.title: Controlled Build Process
controls.rationale: Build-output uniqueness is already evaluated from artifact digest or version metadata.
controls.next_action: Retain artifact metadata fields in downstream evidence.

controls.title: Vulnerability Identification
controls.rationale: Vulnerability scanning is already enforced through policy-as-code.
controls.next_action: Keep vulnerability evidence format stable across releases.

controls.title: Vulnerability Identification
controls.rationale: Vulnerability evaluation before release is already covered by machine-readable gate logic.
controls.next_action: Preserve waiver and vulnerability evidence compatibility.

controls.title: Artifact Integrity
controls.rationale: Artifact integrity evidence is already evaluated through policy-as-code.
controls.next_action: Extend only if stronger signing or attestation logic is added.

controls.title: Artifact Integrity
controls.rationale: Artifact identity is already evaluated from structured digest linkage evidence.
controls.next_action: Keep artifact identity semantics stable.

controls.title: Release Authorization
controls.rationale: Release approval is already evaluated from structured approval metadata.
controls.next_action: Maintain release approval evidence fields in the contract.

controls.title: Release Authorization
controls.rationale: Approved-artifact-only deployment is already evaluated from release approval and artifact evidence.
controls.next_action: Extend only if deployment attestation becomes part of the baseline.

controls.title: Pipeline Evidence Generation
controls.rationale: Machine-readable evidence generation is already evaluated from pipeline execution evidence.
controls.next_action: Preserve the current evidence artifact generation path.

controls.title: Operational Traceability
controls.rationale: Operational lifecycle evidence is already evaluated from structured operations fields.
controls.next_action: Keep downstream operational evidence generation consistent.

controls.title: Secure Development Environments
controls.rationale: Central management of development environments is already evaluated from environment metadata.
controls.next_action: Maintain structured environment evidence in consumer payloads.

controls.title: Secure Development Environments
controls.rationale: Environment compliance is already evaluated from configuration-baseline evidence fields.
controls.next_action: Extend only if stronger workstation attestation becomes required.

controls.title: DevSecOps Platform Access Control
controls.rationale: Central identity management is already evaluated from structured platform metadata.
controls.next_action: Keep platform evidence fields aligned with access-control expectations.

controls.title: DevSecOps Platform Access Control
controls.rationale: Privileged-access MFA is already enforced through policy-as-code.
controls.next_action: Maintain policy alignment with platform access metadata.

controls.title: Dependency Source Control
controls.rationale: Approved dependency sourcing is already evaluated from structured dependency metadata.
controls.next_action: Preserve dependency source evidence semantics.

controls.title: Dependency Source Control
controls.rationale: External direct-download prevention is already enforced through policy-as-code.
controls.next_action: Keep dependency-source policy checks aligned with workflow behavior.

controls.title: Artifact Signing
controls.rationale: Artifact signing is already enforced through policy-as-code.
controls.next_action: Maintain signing evidence and released workflow compatibility.

controls.title: Artifact Signing
controls.rationale: Signing-key protection is already evaluated from structured signing metadata.
controls.next_action: Extend only if centralized key attestation becomes required.

controls.title: Infrastructure as Code
controls.rationale: IaC presence is already evaluated through policy-as-code in the current run profile.
controls.next_action: Keep IaC evidence fields and policy checks aligned.

controls.title: Infrastructure as Code
controls.rationale: IaC version control is already evaluated from structured infrastructure metadata.
controls.next_action: Preserve IaC repository evidence semantics.

controls.title: Pipeline Security Gates
controls.rationale: Pipeline security-gate enforcement is already enforced through policy-as-code.
controls.next_action: Keep workflow evidence and gate semantics consistent.

controls.title: Pipeline Security Gates
controls.rationale: Security-threshold release blocking is already enforced through policy-as-code and waiver checks.
controls.next_action: Keep waiver and vulnerability gate behavior aligned.

controls.title: Security Monitoring
controls.rationale: Security-event generation is already evaluated from structured monitoring metadata.
controls.next_action: Maintain monitoring evidence compatibility.

controls.title: Security Monitoring
controls.rationale: Security-event forwarding is already evaluated from structured monitoring metadata.
controls.next_action: Extend only if richer SOC integration evidence is required.

controls.title: Deterministic Builds
controls.rationale: Reproducible-build verification is not yet machine-implemented in the current repository evaluator.
controls.next_action: Add structured rebuild-verification evidence and implement evaluator logic for deterministic builds.

controls.title: Deterministic Builds
controls.rationale: Version-controlled build-configuration evidence is not yet machine-implemented for L3 evaluation.
controls.next_action: Add explicit build-configuration metadata and evaluator support for version-control assertions.

controls.title: Build Environment Isolation
controls.rationale: Isolated build-environment checking is marked as automated but not yet implemented in the evaluator.
controls.next_action: Add explicit isolated-environment evidence fields and implement pass-fail logic.

controls.title: Build Environment Isolation
controls.rationale: Recreated-per-run build-environment checking is marked as automated but not yet evaluator-backed.
controls.next_action: Add recreatable-environment evidence and implement evaluator support.

controls.title: Dependency Provenance
controls.rationale: Dependency provenance evidence exists conceptually but is not yet evaluated in machine-readable form.
controls.next_action: Extend the evidence contract with provenance fields and add evaluator logic.

controls.title: Dependency Provenance
controls.rationale: Build-time provenance recording is not yet implemented in the current evaluator.
controls.next_action: Add provenance-capture evidence and build-process evaluation logic.

controls.title: Trusted Artifact Signing
controls.rationale: Enterprise signing-infrastructure usage is marked as automated but not yet evaluator-backed.
controls.next_action: Add enterprise-signing evidence fields and implement evaluator logic for trusted signing.

controls.title: Trusted Artifact Signing
controls.rationale: Central signing-key management is marked as automated but not yet evaluator-backed for L3.
controls.next_action: Add centralized key-management evidence and evaluator support.

controls.title: End-to-End Traceability
controls.rationale: End-to-end lifecycle traceability beyond current L1 traceability coverage is not yet machine-implemented.
controls.next_action: Extend the evidence contract for deployment and lifecycle linkage and implement evaluator logic.

controls.title: Runtime Integrity Verification
controls.rationale: Runtime integrity verification is marked as automated but not yet implemented in the evaluator.
controls.next_action: Add runtime-integrity evidence fields and implement automated evaluation logic.

controls.title: Continuous Compliance Evidence
controls.rationale: Continuous lifecycle compliance evidence is marked as automated but not yet evaluator-backed.
controls.next_action: Extend lifecycle evidence generation and add evaluator logic for L3 compliance evidence.
